# Midwess — Software that feels like magic.

Midwess is a software design studio from the Mekong Delta. We design and build software that people actually love to use, combining world-class design with high-performance engineering.

## Products

### Bytover
Instant P2P sharing that feels like magic. No cloud, no zips, no waiting.

## Services

- Software Design & UI/UX
- Engineering & Development
- Technical Storytelling

- /products/bytover - Bytover Product

## Blog

Stories of discovery, mistakes, and breakthroughs in software craft.
